name: iWonder Repo
subtitle: Репозиторий от iwndrer.t.me
description:
Ну да, это мой репозиторий. Собираюсь постепенно расширять.

P.S. На кнопке "Patreon" ссылка в CryptoBot для поддержки меня и моей деятельности. Спасибо.

apps.name: Feather

apps.localizedDescription: Feather is a free on-device iOS application manager/installer built with UIKit for quality.

apps.name: Whitegram
apps.subtitle: Мод на Telegram аля аюграм
apps.localizedDescription: Модифицированная версия клиента Telegram с функциями из не менее популярного AyuGram для Android.

privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: We need this so that you can take and share photos and videos.
privacy.NSContactsUsageDescription: Telegram stores your contacts heavily encrypted in the cloud to let you connect with your friends across all your devices.
privacy.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: You can use Face ID to unlock the app.
privacy.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: When you send your location to your friends, Telegram needs access to show them a map. You also need this to send locations from an Apple Watch.
privacy.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: When you send your location to your friends, Telegram needs access to show them a map.
privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: We need this so that you can record and share voice messages and videos with sound.
privacy.NSMotionUsageDescription: When you send your location to your friends, Telegram needs access to show them a map.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: We need this so that you can share photos and videos from your photo library.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: We need this so that you can share photos and videos from your photo library.
privacy.NSSiriUsageDescription: You can use Siri to send messages.
privacy.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: We need this to transcribe audio messages on your request.

apps.name: StikDebug
apps.subtitle: Активатор JIT прямо на устройстве и мультитул.
apps.localizedDescription: Активатор JIT прямо на устройстве и мультитул для iOS 17.4+ с помощью idevice. Внимание: нужен LocalDevVPN, не может быть использован внутри LiveContainer для включения JIT в том же контейнере.

apps.name: ESign
apps.subtitle: Установщик сертификатом для iOS 11-18
apps.localizedDescription: Старый добрый установщик приложений через сертификат. Не рекомендуется использовать на iOS 26.
